question: The bar chart shows the adjusted revenue from 2018 to 2022. Based on what is visible, which statement is most accurate?

options.A: The adjusted revenue is lowest in 2018 and highest in 2021.
options.B: Adjusted revenue is identical in 2021 and 2022.
options.C: Adjusted revenue decreases every year from 2019 to 2022.
options.D: All five years shown have the same adjusted revenue.

explanation: The y-scale is set so that the largest values are cut off, creating a misleading impression that the top two years are equal.
